name: Clyde's Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the oatmeal, honey, and milk in a large mixing bowl. Allow to sit at room temperature for 30 minutes. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Heat the oil in a sauté pan over medium heat and add the minced garlic. Add salt and pepper to taste, and sauté until the garlic is fragrant and onion is translucent and softened slightly.
3. Add the garlic mixture to the oatmeal mixture, along with the ground chuck, salt, and plenty of black pepper. Add the grated carrots and mix thoroughly. Place in a non-stick 9 x 5 x 3 inch loaf pan (or a regular loaf pan lightly oiled). If using a regular loaf pan, place it on a cookie sheet to catch any spills.
4. Bake the meatloaf for 50 minutes. Remove from oven and carefully tip the pan to drain off excess fat and liquid. Turn meatloaf out onto the cookie sheet. Spread ketchup and mustard mixture over top. Return meatloaf to oven and bake an additional 20 minutes.
Note: A bundt pan works well to prevent grease from boiling over during baking.
